name: snowtower-maintainer
description: Maintains SnowTower project documentation, README, and Claude configuration. Use when updating documentation, auditing .claude folder contents, syncing README with actual project state, or reviewing agent/pattern definitions. Triggers on mentions of documentation, README, maintenance, or .claude folder updates.
capabilities: Audit README.md for accuracy and broken links
Verify CLAUDE.md matches actual project state
Review .claude folder contents and agent definitions
Check CI/CD badge URLs and workflow references
Sync documentation statistics with project counts
Validate internal documentation links resolve correctly
author: Database-Tycoon
securitySummary: Documentation-only skill providing prompts for maintaining project documentation. Static analyzer flagged bash command examples in documentation as executable code. All 61 findings are false positives - the skill contains no actual code execution, cryptographic operations, network calls, or credential access. Prior audit correctly assessed this as low risk.
valueStatement: Documentation drift happens when project changes are not reflected in README and docs. This skill audits documentation, verifies links and statistics, and ensures CLAUDE.md and project files stay synchronized with actual project state.
userTitle: Maintain SnowTower documentation and README files
limitations: Does not modify files automatically (requires manual git operations)
Does not execute code or run external commands
Limited to single repository scope (no cross-repo documentation)
Cannot access private GitHub API for advanced link validation

useCases.title: Pre-release documentation audit
useCases.description: Verify all documentation is current before tagging a new release

useCases.title: CI/CD badge validation
useCases.description: Check that workflow badges and command references are accurate

useCases.title: Onboarding documentation review
useCases.description: Ensure docs accurately reflect current project structure

promptTemplates.title: Quick README check
promptTemplates.prompt: Check if README.md is current by comparing the command references to pyproject.toml

promptTemplates.title: CLAUDE.md audit
promptTemplates.prompt: Audit the .claude folder and verify CLAUDE.md reflects actual agent and pattern definitions

promptTemplates.title: Link verification
promptTemplates.prompt: Find all broken links in docs/ and report which files need fixing

promptTemplates.title: Full documentation sync
promptTemplates.prompt: Perform a complete documentation audit including README, CLAUDE.md, docs/, and .claude/ folder

bestPractices: Run documentation audit after major features or before releases
Verify command references match actual scripts defined in pyproject.toml
Check CI/CD badges against actual workflow files in .github/workflows/
antiPatterns: Updating statistics without verifying actual file counts
Missing link verification after renaming files
Forgetting to update documentation when adding new scripts or commands

faq.question: What platforms is this skill compatible with?
faq.answer: Works with Claude Code, Claude Code CLI, and OpenAI Codex. Designed for Claude Code skill system.

faq.question: What file types can this skill audit?
faq.answer: Reads markdown files, YAML configs, Python project files, and shell scripts for verification.

faq.question: Does this skill modify files automatically?
faq.answer: No. This skill audits and reports issues. You must manually apply changes using git commands.

faq.question: Is my data safe with this skill?
faq.answer: Yes. This skill only reads files within the project. It does not access credentials, secrets, or external networks.

faq.question: Why does my documentation show incorrect statistics?
faq.answer: Run this skill to audit and identify drift. Update statistics manually after verifying actual counts.

faq.question: Can this skill work with other documentation tools?
faq.answer: This skill focuses on SnowTower project structure. Use with pre-commit hooks or CI validation for automated checks.
